title: Opening for Software Engineer at Docplexus

jsonLd.title: Opening for Software Engineer at Docplexus
jsonLd.description:
Docplexus invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Software Engineer at our Navi Mumbai location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Docplexus:
Docplexus is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Machine Learning

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Docplexus!
